ops.body: Fixed in 08187680: plugin/skills/using-cc-notes/SKILL.md lines 151 and 306 now document the papercut MCP arg as body (references/cli-reference.md was already correct). Location correction to this task's title: the fix does NOT belong upstream in cc-skills — ~/Code/cc-skills has no using-cc-notes skill (checked every plugin dir and marketplace.json); the skill source lives in this repo at plugin/skills/using-cc-notes/. Note text remains a genuine property on task_criterion_add and the runbook step tools — only the papercut references were stale. v0.32.0 shipped with the stale doc; the fix reaches plugin installs with the next release.
